headline: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Could Be 6% Overvalued Following Record Q2
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) just posted a record second quarter, with net income of US$312 million and diluted earnings of US$0.69 per share, beating analyst expectations and drawing fresh attention to the stock’s recent rally. See our latest analysis for Interactive Brokers Group. Despite the record quarter and product launches in areas like cryptocurrency, Interactive Brokers Group’s near term share price has cooled slightly. The 7 day share price return is 4.01% and the 30 day share...
